subject: fix(quality): remove dead code, add error handling, fix hook violations
body:
Codebase review identified several issues:
- Dead mock data files (mockAgreements, mockModules, mockProjects) never
  imported after Supabase migration — deleted
- getSession() in AuthContext had no .catch(), causing silent failures on
  network errors — added catch with loading state fallthrough
- Async handlers in AgreementDetailPage called updateAgreement without
  await and without try/catch — errors silently swallowed, toast fired
  before operation completed — now properly awaited with error toasts
- handleGenerateVerification passed unused snapshotContent parameter
  (server-side RPC ignores it) — removed dead parameter from hook type
  and call site
- useCallback called inline in JSX (Rules of Hooks violation) in 3 page
  files — extracted to component body as clearToast
- ErrorBoundary logged stack traces via console.error in production —
  gated behind import.meta.env.DEV
- Modal close button missing type="button" — could cause accidental form
  submission when Modal wraps a form

Tags: cleanup, dead-code, error-handling, hooks, security
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: code-quality
Semver: patch

title: remove dead code, add error handling, fix hook violations
